name: Beyond the Gates
author: Phelps, Elizabeth Stuart
body:
The Gates Ajar. 16mo, $1.50.

HOUGHTON, MIFFLIN AND COMPANY,
4 PARK ST., BOSTON. 11 EAST 17TH ST., NEW YORK.
